freeze.backwardCompatibility: Phase 84 adds the broader MCP Meals setup/calibration and recipe-book learning read/write tools, separates pantry/plan/history/recipe evidence from user-confirmed food preferences, feeds calibration context into meal planning and grocery-list/grocery-plan honesty, and keeps the ChatGPT v2 review focus on compact Meals onboarding, Grocery List v2, Style setup/calibration, and image-gated Style purchase analysis, with Home, account, recipe, and Health tools present as supporting context or broader profile capabilities. Phase 83 adds the broader MCP Style setup/calibration surface, separates closet evidence from user-confirmed taste, and keeps ChatGPT focused on the current Style purchase-analysis path while richer setup support matures across hosts. Phase 82 adds a 10-item Style purchase-analysis shopping-assistant eval set and tightens comparator quality across shoe wardrobe jobs, jersey-knit tops, outerwear duplicates, same-category rejection buckets, and bottom pairing evidence so broad metadata matches are not promoted as primary substitutes. Phase 81 improves Style purchase-analysis comparator quality so broad same-category top matches are bucketed by wardrobe job, MCP Apps vision packets distinguish direct comparators from adjacent and rejected context, and athletic/performance tees no longer act as primary substitutes for casual/lifestyle tees. Phase 80 moves Style purchase-analysis to v22 so ChatGPT/MCP Apps hosts can pass an agent-owned structured stylist_judgment into the native card after visual inspection, while purchase-analysis v21, v20, and v19 remain registered for compatibility. Phase 79 moves Style purchase-analysis to v21 so MCP Apps hosts refetch the native card after accepted visual observations and explicit widget rendering, while purchase-analysis v20 and v19 remain registered for compatibility. Phase 78 moves Style purchase-analysis to v20 so MCP Apps hosts refetch the native ui/initialize bridge, tool-input-partial hydration, local action state, and post-initialize size notifications, while purchase-analysis v19 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 77 moves recipe-card to v11 so MCP Apps hosts refetch the native ui/initialize bridge, delayed tool-result/tool-input hydration, tool-input-partial handling, local control state, and post-initialize size notifications, while recipe-card v10, v9, and v8 remain registered for compatibility. Phase 76 moves grocery-list to v71 so each visible bucket receives the correct primary widget action even when host payload action ordering carries stale pantry metadata, while grocery-list v70 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 75 moves grocery-list to v70 so optimistic Done undo prefers the item bucket the user just acted from over stale source metadata, while grocery-list v69 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 74 moves grocery-list to v69 so Done undo restores pantry/check-at-home items to their prior active section during optimistic local reconciliation, while grocery-list v68 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 73 moves grocery-list to v68 so successful widget saves immediately move checked items into Done, keep reversible local edits visible while host refreshes catch up, and broaden deterministic MCP Apps interaction coverage, while grocery-list v67 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 72 moves grocery-list to v67 and includes safe checkbox action metadata in public structuredContent so real MCP Apps hosts render bought-item controls even when _meta is unavailable, while grocery-list v66 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 71 moves grocery-list to v66 so MCP Apps hosts refetch schema-valid reconstructed checkbox and pantry fallback write actions, while grocery-list v65 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 70 moves grocery-list to v65 so MCP Apps hosts refetch checkbox fallback actions when only structuredContent reaches the iframe, while grocery-list v64 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 69 moves grocery-list to v64 so MCP Apps hosts refetch the single-target postMessage transport, post-initialize size notifications, and behavior-tested tool-input-partial hydration, while grocery-list v63 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 68 moves grocery-list to v63 so MCP Apps hosts refetch a view-initiated MCP Apps handshake, standard initialized/size notifications, and tool-input-partial hydration, while grocery-list v62 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 67 moves grocery-list to v62 so MCP Apps hosts refetch widget hydration that accepts App SDK tool-result and tool-input notifications when globals arrive late, while grocery-list v61 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 66 moves Home to v21 and grocery-list to v61 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch Home modal handoff params and the Grocery widget hydrates from modal params as well as direct tool output, while Home v20 and grocery-list v60 remain registered for compatibility. Phase 65 moves Home to v20 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch typed Home handoff actions, host-message fallback prompts for Grocery and Health Today, and meal-memory copy that never exposes internal statuses such as proven or retired, while v19 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 64 moves Home to v19 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch direct Home action language, a Grocery List modal handoff when the host supports requestModal, less internal Health/Meals copy, and the v18 Home resource remains registered for compatibility. Phase 63 moves Home to v18 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch a stricter overview-only Home surface: Home preview buttons are labeled as previews, direct grocery-list and today-training asks are explicitly routed to their dedicated Grocery and Health tools instead of Home, and the visual treatment matches the restrained Grocery/Style widget language more closely, while v17 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 62 moves Style purchase-analysis to v19 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch widget hydration that accepts direct tool-result notifications when globals arrive late, while v18 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 61 moves Home to v16 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the honest Home overview: direct grocery/training asks route to their dedicated surfaces, the in-widget grocery control is labeled as a preview rather than a launcher, projected Health sessions no longer create a fake today-training action, and Home copy/design aligns with the current Fluent widgets, while v15 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 60 moves recipe-card to v10 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the screen-reader-visible per-serving spacing fix, while v9 and v8 remain registered for compatibility. Phase 59 moves Home to v15 and recipe-card to v9 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the canonical living-grocery Home summary, state-aware training action, friendlier recipe fallback, and per-serving cost label, while Home v14 and recipe-card v8 remain registered for compatibility. Phase 58 moves Style purchase-analysis to v18 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the recommendation-only closet write action; non-buy verdicts stay advisory in the widget while v17 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 57 moved Style purchase-analysis to v17 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetched the less repetitive skip explanation and the now-retired secondary Add to closet anyway action, while v16 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 56 moves Home to v14 so direct grocery/training asks route to the dedicated surfaces, the Home widget uses the same restrained Fluent action language as Grocery/Style, and v13 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 55 moves recipe-card to v8 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the cookable first-screen layout with a visible first method step, Start cook mode CTA, friendlier missing-recipe copy, and v7 retained for compatibility. Phase 54 moves Style purchase-analysis to v16 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the photo-read explanation, less taxonomy-heavy overlap copy, secondary add-anyway action for non-buy verdicts, current metadata versioning, and stricter visual-evidence validation, while v15 remains registered for compatibility. Phase 53 moves Home to v13 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the promotion-quality Home surface: a single recommended next step, clearer account/domain language, real grocery/training action details, and keyboard/focus/live-region semantics, while v10, v11, and v12 remain registered for compatibility. Phase 52 moves Home to v12 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the useful Home surface: Fluent design language, human copy, and in-widget grocery/training previews after action clicks, while v10 and v11 remain registered for compatibility. Phase 51 moves Home to v11 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch account/access visibility, safe read-only next actions, accessible action status, and graceful partial-domain recovery, while v10 remains registered for snapshot compatibility. Phase 50 moves grocery-list to v60 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the living grocery-list lifecycle surface with provenance/trust state, current-list copy, explicit Save changes/Refresh list controls, separated Already have enough/Add to buy list/Mark bought actions, and shopping-session freshness handling, while v57, v58, and v59 remain registered for compatibility. Phase 49 moves Style purchase-analysis to v15 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the editorial title hook used by launch QA and live evidence checks, while v14 remains registered as the previous resource. Phase 48 moves grocery-list to v59 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the accessibility target-size fix for checkboxes and the Covered toggle, while v57 and v58 remain registered for snapshot compatibility. Phase 47 moves grocery-list to v58 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the explicit refresh/readback control, live sync status, and clearer partial-sync recovery copy, while v57 remains registered as the previous resource. Phase 46 removes non-widget Style purchase-analysis fallback tools from the current ChatGPT path while preserving them in the broader MCP contract, so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts are routed through visual observations and the rich purchase-analysis widget instead of stopping at prose. Phase 45 moves Style purchase-analysis to v14 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the editorial purchase-analysis layout with human closet-context sections and less comparison telemetry, while v13 remains registered as the previous resource. Phase 44 moves Style purchase-analysis to v13 so the comparison strip shows closet comparators only, and no-image candidates remain not-render-ready even if a host submits visual-evidence-shaped input. Phase 43 moves Style purchase-analysis to v12 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch image-framed product thumbnails, with v11 retained as the previous template. Phase 42 moves Home to v10 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the initial Home check-in, removes inert Home next-action buttons, and keeps account/status tool output free of first-layer hosted/cloud wording. Phase 41 keeps Pantry Dashboard in the broader MCP contract, hosted runtime, and widget resources while keeping the current ChatGPT path focused on recipe, grocery-list, Style, Health, Home, and account-status workflows. Phase 40 moves pantry-dashboard to v14 with v13 retained as the previous template and keeps the You tell me edit form draft-stable across host hydration so quantity, unit, state, and remove actions refresh the visible widget immediately. Phase 39 moves pantry-dashboard to v13 with v12 retained as the previous template and keeps the You tell me footer totals in sync after local set/remove staple mutation. Phase 38 moves pantry-dashboard to v12 with v11 retained as the previous template, makes set/remove staple interactions update from safe local mutation after successful widget tool calls, and removes raw inventory IDs from pantry action structured/text payloads. Phase 37 moves Home to v9, grocery-list to v57, pantry-dashboard to v11, and purchase-analysis to v11 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch widgets that prefer the native window.openai.callTool path over the fallback bridge; pantry render structuredContent is now summary-only so normal assistant prose cannot echo raw dashboard IDs. Phase 36 moves pantry-dashboard to v10 with v9 retained as the previous template, keeps same-id pantry refreshes working with a content fingerprint hydration guard, and avoids reusing the first v9 host cache. Phase 35 moves pantry-dashboard to v9 with v8 retained as the previous template, replaces stale same-dashboard-id widget hydration with fresh snapshots, and adds set_staple for explicit quantity, unit, and state editing. Phase 34 moves pantry-dashboard to v8 with v7 retained as the previous template and adds a reviewer-safe remove-staple action so QA/demo staples can be cleared from the dashboard. Phase 33 moves pantry-dashboard to v7 with v6 retained as the previous template, removes dashboard_id from widget-initiated pantry action calls, and moves Fluent Home to v8 so the initial Home experience no longer advertises Pantry Dashboard as a primary next action. Phase 32 moves pantry-dashboard to v6 with v5 retained as the previous template so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch widget action code that preserves tool invocation metadata and item IDs. Phase 31 moves Fluent Home to v7 and keeps widget accessibility only on the tool descriptor, matching the working Meals and Style widget resource metadata shape. Phase 30 moves Fluent Home to v6 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch the Home widget with render-tool OAuth metadata in place. Phase 29 cache-busts changed widget bundles for ChatGPT/App SDK hosts by moving Fluent Home to v5, pantry-dashboard to v5 with v4 retained as the previous template, and Style purchase-analysis to v10 with v9 retained as the previous template. Phase 28 kept the previous grocery-list v55, pantry-dashboard v3, and Style purchase-analysis v8 widget resources for compatibility and adds grocery-list v56, pantry-dashboard v4, and Style purchase-analysis v9 so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetch bridge-first widget action code. Phase 27 kept the v2, v3, v4, v5, v6, and v7 Style purchase-analysis widget resources for compatibility and added the v8 widget resource so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetched the corrected inline closeness score renderer without clamping already-percent comparator scores to 100%. Phase 26 kept the v2, v3, v4, v5, and v6 Style purchase-analysis widget resources for compatibility and added the v7 widget resource so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetched the combined closet-comparison cards with inline closeness scores instead of rendering a redundant separate closeness section. Phase 25 kept the v2, v3, v4, and v5 Style purchase-analysis widget resources for compatibility and added the v6 widget resource so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetched the more human stylist copy for photo reads and verdict reasons instead of reusing cached v5 markup. Phase 24 kept the v2, v3, and v4 Style purchase-analysis widget resources for compatibility and added the v5 widget resource so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetched the image-CSP and closet-comparator-photo improvements instead of reusing cached v4 markup. Phase 23 kept the v2 and v3 Style purchase-analysis widget resources for compatibility and added the v4 widget resource so ChatGPT/App SDK hosts refetched the polished stylist-analysis HTML instead of reusing cached v3 markup. Phase 22 makes host profiles first-class MCP metadata so ChatGPT, Claude, OpenClaw, Codex, and generic MCP clients can share one canonical Fluent tool vocabulary while using host-aware routing, render-adapter policy, and packaged-skill expectations. Phase 21 added MCP-native runtime guidance resources and fluent_get_next_actions as the in-band skill substitute for ChatGPT and generic MCP hosts, while preserving the full canonical tool surface for Claude, OpenClaw, Codex, OSS, and operator workflows. Phase 20 kept the Style maturity surfaces for item-profile enrichment, provenance reads, evidence-gap reporting, and wardrobe analysis; removed the legacy meals_render_grocery_list alias and grocery_list_widget capability while preserving meals_render_grocery_list_v2 as the canonical ChatGPT/App SDK grocery-list render surface; added the v3 Style purchase-analysis widget resource while keeping the v2 widget resource for compatibility; added style_prepare_purchase_analysis as the first-hop purchase-analysis routing tool, keeps style_render_purchase_analysis as non-widget structured output, and gates the actual style_show_purchase_analysis_widget surface behind host visual evidence; and kept Health on the block-first coaching surface instead of the pre-production weekly-plan contract.
freeze.scopeException: Health tools prefer health:read and health:write. Style tools prefer style:read and style:write, while hosted continues to accept legacy meals scopes for the Style surface during the current bridge window.

versionPolicy.minimumClientBehavior: Clients and packages declare the minimum supported contract version.
versionPolicy.packageUpdateRule: Breaking contract changes require package updates before release.
